div.note: RSC Lot 60–D 224, Box 96: US Cr Min 22

head.hi: Minutes of the Twenty-Second Meeting of the United States Delegation, Held at San Francisco, Saturday, April 28, 1943, 9:30 a.m.

div.p:
[Here follows list of names of persons (42) present at meeting, and statements by the delegates to the Advisers, announcement of schedule
of meetings, discussions regarding a memorandum on press policy, report on work of the Conference, and anticipated study of the problem of withdrawal.]
